command:
start=$(python3 - <<'PY'
import time
print(int(time.time()*1000))
PY
)
bun test src/execution/review-prompt.test.ts --filter "continuation"
code=$?
end=$(python3 - <<'PY'
import time
print(int(time.time()*1000))
PY
)
echo "__RESULT__ exit=$code duration_ms=$((end-start))"
exit $code
